message:
feat: Add JSPI support to PythonDO with runtime feature detection

Split host imports into three layers:
- syncImports(): tcp_connect, tcp_send, tcp_close, env_get, console_log,
  http_response_status/read/header — always synchronous
- jspiAsyncImports(): tcp_recv, http_fetch, kv_*, r2_*, d1_exec wrapped
  with WebAssembly.Suspending — WASM stack suspends, JS awaits, resumes
- trampolineAsyncImports(): same ops via NeedsAsync throw/catch/replay

Runtime detection via typeof WebAssembly.Suspending:
- JSPI available: runWithJSPI() — single _start invocation wrapped with
  WebAssembly.promising(), zero re-execution
- JSPI unavailable: runWithTrampoline() — in-process fallback with
  deterministic asyncCounter replay
